name: having-with-where-combined
description: where与having联合筛选：先按where筛选办公用品品类，再按having筛选销售额超5万或利润超1万的省份
code: const applyBuilder = (builder: VBIChartBuilder) => { builder.whereFilter.add('product_type', n => n.setOperator('=').setValue('办公用品')); builder.havingFilter.addGroup('or', g => { g.add('sales', n => n.setAggregate({"func":"sum"}).setOperator('gt').setValue(50000)); g.add('profit', n => n.setAggregate({"func":"sum"}).setOperator('gt').setValue(10000)); }); }
